description: align_engines: 2 auth profiles (api_key + plain), single handler. Each profile's engine trio (engine_mode/engine/engine_group, incl. the plain_protectwise_* prefixed variant) is merged into one fields block, engine_group is renamed to engineGroup (connection field id, triggers effect/condition ids, and serializer field_mappings id), and engine + engineGroup get create/edit required: true.
